svg.title: Lesson agent StateGraph
svg.desc: A diagram of the lesson agent. The blocking router fans out to five LangGraph nodes — hint, paraphrase, classify_reflection, scaffold_mc, advance_to_beat — which all return to END. A sixth node, chat, exists as a blocking fallback; the primary chat path bypasses the graph and streams tokens directly from the LLM via SSE.
svg.text: CLAUDE HAIKU 4.5 · MONTESSORI POST-FILTER ON EVERY NODE

g.text: blocking — used when streaming isn't available
ChatRail.onSend → streamChat() ⟶ buildChatMessages() ⟶ ChatAnthropic.stream() ⟶ SSE (data: token, data: [DONE])
Bypasses the graph; same prompt source. Zero tokens → aiReplyTo() canonical fallback.
